MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-08-2010 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-08-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff, Melvin Mosk is present. Represented by Knowl Radcliff.
Attorney, Joseph Sacramento, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Linda Sharp, is present.
Attorney, Megan Thompson, representing the defendant through full scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Ora Prochovnick, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 305B, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
This case settled, the trial date of JUL-12-2010 is vacated.
